h_I_le_J : J ≤ I
h_final_left : ∀ N ∈ J, N ∈ I
⊢ ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J

      have h₆ : N ∈ J := by
        -- Apply the refinement property to get N in J

          exact J.refinement_of_bounded(h_J_le_I) ⟨N, h₂⟩
        rcases h₇ with ⟨B, hB_sub, hB_eq⟩
        -- If B is empty, then N = ⊥, but ⊥ is not in J, so contradiction

        · -- If B is nonempty, then N ∈ sSup B ⊆ J
